name: pr-review
description: Preflight wrapper around the official code-review plugin. Exposes skill pr-review:review (gathers review rules + ticket context, then chains to /code-review:code-review) and a guarded update-check workflow for the pinned upstream version.

code-review.note: Update review/SKILL.md, snapshot under state/code-review-pinned/, then bump this version when accepting an upstream change. Run /pr-review:check-code-review-updates to drive the review.
